text.content: Sequence: 1 of 4. Must complete before TKT-0070, TKT-0071, TKT-0072. Foundation for all EA and product decisions. | VMS document received from Perplexity research 2026-05-07. Key outputs: Vision/Mission/Positioning defined. Auralith introduced as IP/tech entity. GCC added as Year 3 market. Training ladder L1/L2/L3 formalised. Revenue mix: Y1 80/20, Y3 45/40/15, Y5 all pillars. 8 execution guardrails for Yoda/Atlas/Ahsoka. Document stored: workspace/media/inbound/ainchors-VMS135. Needs: Ken review + formal approval + commit to Holocron. Feeds TKT-0070/0071/0072. | CONFIRMED 2026-05-07 03:06 AEST by Ken: Auralith is a real entity. Ken intends to incorporate. Auralith = IP/technology company that owns and operates Nexus. AInchors Solutions Pty Ltd = market-facing brand. This is a structural architecture decision — feeds Atlas EA, Ahsoka positioning, and Holocron structure. Update MEMORY.md, Atlas SOUL.md scope, and EA roadmap accordingly.
